env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db init
sin-code todo hook --config $WORK/hooks.toml add post_complete --command 'echo done' --timeout 5s
stdout 'Added hook'
sin-code todo hook --config $WORK/hooks.toml list
stdout 'post_complete'
stdout 'echo done'
sin-code todo hook --config $WORK/hooks.toml path
stdout 'hooks.toml'
